200# return «

User rating: item not rated yet

Fighter type: Mage

Introduced in: Special offer

 

Write a review Send to Discord

Rate this item


description 2/6

Once in a while, launches a ghostly arm at an enemy, dealing 40000 pure damage.

description 4/6

Once in a while, launches a ghostly arm at an enemy, dealing 50000 pure damage. Then, ghostly arms begin to spread within a large radius, tangling enemies. All affected enemies are slowed down and take 60000 damage over 5 sec.

description 6/6

Once in a while, launches a ghostly arm at an enemy, dealing 60000 pure damage. Then, ghostly arms begin to spread within a large radius, tangling enemies. All affected enemies are slowed down and take 80000 damage over 5 sec. Once in a while, in the absence of living allied tanks, turns into a horrible ghost that fights at close quarters. Its health equals 804160 of its attack stat, and its attacks deal 50000 damage. Also, it makes all enemies attack it. When the ghost is killed, Octohand reappers with their health at its max. Also, the ghost has the following abilities : -Once in a while, casts fear on all enemies within a small radius for 1 sec. Whe the fear wears off, all enemies are unable to use their abilities for 5 sec. -Once in a while, deals damage to all enemies within a large radius. The damage equals 70% of the attack stat.


Substance of Chaos

description 2/6

The ghostly hand deals additional pure damage equal to 50% of the Octohand’s spell power.

description 4/6

The ghostly hand deals additional pure damage equal to 50% of the Octohand’s spell power. Enemies entangled by the ghostly arms have a 50% chance to have their armor is torn, that enemy takes 150000 pure damage and has their physical armor reduced by 30% for 3 sec. Stacks up to 3 times. Also, that enemy takes 200000 physical damage over 3 sec.

description 6/6

The ghostly hand deals additional pure damage equal to 50% of the Octohand’s spell power. Enemies entangled by the ghostly arms have a 50% chance to have their armor is torn, that enemy takes 150000 pure damage and has their physical armor reduced by 30% for 3 sec. Stacks up to 3 times. Also, that enemy takes 200000 physical damage over 3 sec. The Ghost’s splash attack ignores 100% armor.


Substance of Greatness

description 2/6

When a ghostly hand hits an enemy, Octohand gains a shield that absorbs damage equal to the damage dealt by the hand. The shield absorbs damage of any type and lasts for 2 sec.

description 4/6

When a ghostly hand hits an enemy, Octohand gains a shield that absorbs damage equal to the damage dealt by the hand. The shield absorbs damage of any type and lasts for 2 sec. All allies caught in the area of the ghostly arms take 15% les damage for 5 sec. During that time, Octohand takes 25% less damage.

description 6/6

When a ghostly hand hits an enemy, Octohand gains a shield that absorbs damage equal to the damage dealt by the hand. The shield absorbs damage of any type and lasts for 2 sec. All allies caught in the area of the ghostly arms take 15% les damage for 5 sec. During that time, Octohand takes 25% less damage. The health and damage of the Ghost increase by 50% of Octohand’s spell power.


Substance of Harmony

description 2/6

The ghostly hand reduces the target’s magic armor by 20% for 3 sec.

description 4/6

The ghostly hand reduces the target’s magic armor by 20% for 3 sec. Enemies entangled by ghostly arms take 75% more magic damage for 7 sec.

description 6/6

The ghostly hand reduces the target’s magic armor by 20% for 3 sec. Enemies entangled by ghostly arms take 75% more magic damage for 7 sec. The damage of enemies in a small radius around the Ghost is reduced by 30%.
